When agencies don't deliver records

Sig Splichal University of Miami December 1995
Data & DatabasesInvestigative MethodsGovernment & Politics

Courts and government agencies are divided on interpretations of public records laws, with some using technical means like computer tape formats to obstruct media and public access to government information.

Most laws governing public and media access to government records... more usable form - on computer tape? Cour disagree among themselves... to thwart access.
